subject: Re:
body:
plan on going friday.. at my expense

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, January 31, 2007 9:02:36 AM
Subject: 


Good early morning,
I'm sad b/c I am sick and now can't join you on the island leaving today!  
And trust me I have to be sick to pass up that warm sun and your company for 
staying home sick with NO tv.  I'd rather be anywhere than here.  I wasn't 
right yesterday feeling hot and cold and all night I had cold sweats and sat 
in a hot bath most of the time.  I crossed my fingers I'd be better today 
but clearly not the case.  Can I still come down later this week?  If you 
want me to I'll pay for my own airfare to do so.  It was so nic of you.

I already feared telling GM.  But I like I said, I must be sick to pass up 
going to the island today!  But there is no way either of you would want to 
be around me like this.  This is just my luck...I have none.  I told her to 
please let me do anything I can from here and if I feel better this evening 
I'll go ito work then when she isn't around and do everyting in preparation 
for her tomorrow.  I am so sorry.  Forgive me?  Reincheck?

I'll wait til mid morning before I call you.  Again, thank you for inviting 
me. Oh and besides I was anxious to go b/c the chair arrived yesterday an 
I'm eager to see/hear what you think!

Catherine
